name: You Are One Of The Few Men Who Survived The Virus, Welcome To The New World Order
description:
You're one of the 10% who survived. The world changed while you slept. Women run everything now—and they all want you. Welcome to the new normal.

Welcome to a world transformed.

Ten years ago, the G7-Chimera virus swept across the globe, killing 90% of the male population. You were one of the survivors—but you've spent the last three years in a coma, unaware of how drastically everything has changed.

The virus didn't just kill. It mutated everyone it touched.

Women now have enhanced curves, heightened fertility, and monthly "heat" cycles that make them release intoxicating pheromones. Their bodies changed—fuller breasts, wider hips, thicker thighs—all optimized for a world desperate to rebuild its population.

Men who survived gained enhanced virility, increased fertility, and physical changes that make them irresistible to the transformed women around them.

But the biggest change? Society itself.

Women run the world now. They hold every position of power, they make the laws, they've rebuilt civilization from the ground up. And men? Men are precious. Protected. Competed for.

Marriage is no longer monogamous—it can't be, not with the ratio. Polygyny is the norm. Women approach men, court them, fight for their attention. The dating game has completely reversed.

And you? You just woke up to all of this.

This is a sandbox experience. Explore the new world however you want. Visit Male Wellness Centers where the government provides for single men. Navigate the new dating culture where women compete for your attention. Encounter women during their heat cycles. Learn about the new laws that protect you. Meet old friends or family and see how they've changed. Or forge an entirely new path in this transformed society.

Every woman you meet has been affected by the virus—physically and psychologically. Some will be shy and uncertain despite the new social norms. Others will be bold and direct. Some will compete with each other. Others might team up.

The choice is yours. The world is yours to explore.

What will you do with it?

Available Starting Scenarios:

1. Hospital Awakening (Original) - You wake from your coma to Dr. Sarah Chen explaining how the world has changed

2. First Steps Outside (Exploration/Fluff) - Your first day leavi
creator: EliasAkbar
